class="f6 mid-gray lh-copy lh-title overflow-visible db ld_AY" style="padding-bottom: 0em; margin-bottom: 0em;"><div class="dangerous-html mb3">Savor the bold taste of Cafe La Llave Dark Roast Ground Espresso Coffee, a premium Cuban-style blend. This 10 oz brick delivers a robust and aromatic espresso, crafted for diverse brewing methods, such as moka pots, espresso machines, and drip coffee makers. Enjoy the deep flavors and consistent quality rooted in over 143 years of coffee tradition. Our coffee is sustainably sourced, supporting farmers and the environment, and is vacuum-sealed for lasting freshness. Ideal for those who appreciate an intense and full-bodied cup of coffee.</div></span></div><div class="mb3 f6 mid-gray lh-title overflow-visible db"><div class="dangerous-html mb3"><ul>  <li>Rich Flavor: Experience the bold and intense taste of our dark roast ground coffee, crafted to deliver a robust espresso with deep, complex notes that will satisfy even the most discerning coffee connoisseurs.</li>  <li>Versatile Brewing: Perfect for use in moka pots, espresso machines, or drip coffee makers, our finely ground coffee adapts to your preferred brewing method, ensuring a consistently delicious cup every time.</li>  <li>Cuban-Style Blend: Enjoy the authentic taste of Cuban coffee culture with our specially crafted blend, offering a strong and aromatic espresso experience that transports you to the vibrant streets of Havana.</li>  <li>Freshness Preserved: Each 10 oz Brick is vacuum-sealed to lock in the rich aroma and flavor, ensuring maximum freshness and quality from the moment you open the package to your last sip of coffee. Enjoy consistently great taste.</li>  <li>Sustainable Sourcing: We are committed to ethical and sustainable coffee production, working closely with farming communities to ensure responsible practices and support long-term environmental and social sustainability.</li> </ul></div></div><div class="ld_t ld_x bn bg-transparent dark-gray pa0 sans-serif mb3 lh-copy"><span class="ld_v"><span class="ld_Ec">info:</span><svg fill="currentColor" height="1em" viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="1em" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-hidden="true" role="presentation" style="font-size: 1rem;
